section.name: BreakTest community
section.p: BreakTest currently coordinates public development through GitHub. There are no BreakTest mailing lists at this time.

ul.li: Issues for bugs, regressions, feature requests, and documentation feedback
Security policy for private vulnerability reporting
BreakTest Platform for cloud and enterprise workflows

section.note: Apache JMeter community channels remain available for upstream Apache JMeter, but they are not BreakTest support or governance channels.

section.name: Contributing
section.p: For public contributions, fork the repository, create a topic branch, and open a pull request back to BreakTest. Direct pushes to main are not part of the project workflow.
Before proposing a larger change, open an issue that describes the use case and how the change affects compatibility, resource usage, or user-facing behavior.
